title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 28.
content:
There was an Old Man of the West,
    Who wore a pale plum-coloured vest;
    When they said, "Does it fit?"
    He replied, "Not a bit!"
    That uneasy Old Man of the West.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 28."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
